allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add Build Brief form, connect intake forms to Resend, add hash routing

- Created Build Brief \(discovery\) form with 7-section wizard
- Connected StartAProjectPage form to Resend API for email notifications
- Added hash-based routing \(URLs like #discovery, #studio now work\)
- Added security: honeypot spam prevention, input sanitization
- Added accessibility: aria labels, describedby, proper focus management
- Added noindex meta tag support for private pages
- Created discovery questionnaire script for client calls
- Added video URL field for Loom/screen recordings

New files:
- pages/DiscoveryFormPage.tsx
- netlify/functions/submit-intake.mts
- netlify/functions/submit-discovery.mts
- DISCOVERY-QUESTIONNAIRE.md
- hooks/useDocumentHead.ts
- lib/schemas.ts
- components/JsonLd.tsx

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
